title: cliffortia incana
intro: Cliffortia incana, also known as the bushy cliffortia or frost willow, is a small, shrub-like plant native to South Africa, belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Cliffortia incana can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
